'''Voli Quana''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Voli Quana was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Having constructed an amber-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to wield against enemies of the Republic, Master Quana traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] enforcing the Republic's laws.<ref name="BM" />

During her service to the Republic, she was assigned by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to lead members of the [[Republican Army]] against the corrupt [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Vrox]] of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. Joined by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Janx Ferro]] and a group of
[[JU-9 Juggernaut War Droid]]s, Governor Vrox led the [[Mandalorian Armed Forces]] against the Republican Army during the costly [[Battle of Mandalore (pre-Naboo)|battle]] there. Master Quana served as support to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Weirs]] during the battle, helping him communicating his commands to the army by use of her mastery of [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]]. While this strategy was extremely effective, Master Quana was forced to take control of the battle following the assassination of Lieutenant Weirs during an ambush. Under Master Quana's command, the Republic's Army were able to win the battle and capture Vrox.<ref name="BM" />
